deployCard.title: Deploy Settings
deployCard.description: Create a compose file to deploy your compose

deploy.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to deploy this compose?
deploy.tooltip: Downloads the source code and performs a complete build

reload.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to reload this compose?
reload.tooltip: Reload the compose without rebuilding it

start.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to start this compose?
start.tooltip: Start the compose (requires a previous successful build)

stop.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to stop this compose?

composeFileEditor.title: Compose File
composeFileEditor.description: Configure your Docker Compose file for this service.

randomize.title: Randomize Compose (Experimental)
randomize.description: Use this in case you want to deploy the same compose file and you have conflicts with some property like volumes, networks, etc.
randomize.intro: This will randomize the compose file and will add a suffix to the property to avoid conflicts
randomize.envInfo: When you activate this option, we will include a env `COMPOSE_PREFIX` variable to the compose file so you can use it in your compose file.
randomize.applyRandomizeDescription: Apply randomize to the compose file.

showConverted.dialogDescription: Preview your docker-compose file with added domains. Note: At least one domain must be specified for this conversion to take effect.
showConverted.alertInfo: Preview your docker-compose file with added domains. Note: At least one domain must be specified for this conversion to take effect.
